testcase.name: resultPolling_unknownTaskId
testcase.system-out:

testcase.name: resultPolling_afterAnalysis

testcase.name: fallback_returnsOk
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-14T23:27:23.708+04:00 INFO 2230 --- [ai-analysis-service] [ main] c.l.a.controller.AnalyzeController : analyze-by-url: taskId=it-fb-f2e16b23-d19e-410f-9f44-db3617a334df, subject=数学 2026-05-14T23:27:24.227+04:00 INFO 2230 --- [ai-analysis-service] [ main] c.l.a.controller.AiFallbackController : Fallback requested: taskId=it-fb-f2e16b23-d19e-410f-9f44-db3617a334df
